title: pombalia potosina var. pennellii
intro: Pombalia potosina var. pennellii, also known as Pombalia, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Central and South America. Pombalia is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an analgesic. The health benefits of Pombalia include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pombalia may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
